ResearchTabDef.label: Stoneborn
ResearchTabDef.generalDescription: Unlock stoneborn technologies, from cooking, to fermenting ales and wines, to even weaponry.

ResearchProjectDef.label: fungus crops
ResearchProjectDef.description: Plant various mushrooms engineered by the stoneborn for food.

ResearchProjectDef.label: sweet mushrooms
ResearchProjectDef.description: Plant fungus engineered to produce sweet and luxurious things, like gemberries and chocobark.

ResearchProjectDef.label: jelly farming
ResearchProjectDef.description: Place juvenile queens into artificial hives for farming insect jelly.

rulesStrings.li: subject->jelly farming
subject_story->discovered the ability to farm miniscule insectoids
subject_story->stole insect jelly from an insectoid hive for years
subject_story->had a pet insectiary
subject_gerund->farming jelly

ResearchProjectDef.label: kitchen furnishing
ResearchProjectDef.description: Build furniture for kitchens and feast halls.

ResearchProjectDef.label: basic baking
ResearchProjectDef.description: Build the dwarven kiln to begin baking goods from flour.
ResearchProjectDef.discoveredLetterText: Your colony has discovered the wondrous world of stoneborn baking! By planting moldwheat, your colonists can harvest moldflour and bake it into rockbread, or use the oven to prepare simple stews!

rulesStrings.li: subject->baking
subject_story->was invited to a stoneborn feast and became intrepidly curious
subject_story->constructed a simple clay oven to bake bread
subject_story->was part of a cooking entourage for a stoneborn underlord
subject_gerund->utilizing flour

ResearchProjectDef.label: dough preparation
ResearchProjectDef.description: Construct the preparation table to make dough out of dwarven milk and flour.

rulesStrings.li: subject->dough
subject_story->discovered the incredibly properties of moldflour
subject_story->created the first rockpie, accidentally
subject_story->smacked the lights out of a bandit with a rockpie shell
subject_gerund->kneading dough

ResearchProjectDef.label: aging and drying
ResearchProjectDef.description: Prepare fresh cheese to let it age into proper dwarven cheese, or cure raw meat for storing or traveling.

rulesStrings.li: subject->curing
subject_story->made enough cheese to feed a starving platewyrm
subject_story->accidentally let some cheese age for too long
subject_story->supplied an entire expedition with cured meat
subject_story->lived purely off of salted fish for years
subject_gerund->curing meat and cheese

ResearchProjectDef.label: pastry arts
ResearchProjectDef.description: Prepare pastry dough with dwarven milk and fungal flour, then bake it into pastries and pies.

rulesStrings.li: subject->pastries
subject_story->satisfied the palate of the pickiest minefathe of the sector
subject_story->baked one of the best cakes known to stonebornkind
subject_story->cooked berry and chocolate pies for [ANYPAWN_possessive] entire fleet
subject_gerund->baking sweets and pastries

ResearchProjectDef.label: feasts galore
ResearchProjectDef.description: Bake, roast and boil large feasts: meals that increase mood by a lot when warm, but get worse when frozen.

rulesStrings.li: subject->feasts
subject_story->prepared a massive feast for an important stoneborn ceremony
subject_story->participated at a feast in the massive hall of Grugni
subject_story->invented roasted megascarab by leaving an oven on for too long
subject_gerund->cooking large feasts

ResearchProjectDef.label: grilling
ResearchProjectDef.description: Grill various raw foods into skewers or burgers on the hot grill.

rulesStrings.li: subject->grilling
subject_story->worked as a cook at a cave banquet
subject_story->tried hundreds of different food combinations for skewers
subject_story->was inspired by ancient texts to reinvent the burger
subject_story->was sued by Burger Baron for trying to copy the idea of the burger
subject_gerund->grilling burgers and skewers
